name: Dimethyl sulfoxide
plain_summary: Aprotic polar solvent with a longer UV cutoff than alcohols — important when choosing a blank for deep-UV work.

abs.plain_caption: Schematic UV cutoff / edge for DMSO teaching (poorer deep-UV window than MeOH/EtOH).
abs.lit: Teaching solvent-cutoff schematic. DMSO practical UV cutoff often listed near ~265–270 nm.
